summary: Iteration 37: P0 Bug Fixes Verified - Patent-Pending Text & Affiliate Tab. All tests passed. Backend: 6/6 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Landing page shows 'PATENT-PENDING AI TECHNOLOGY', Affiliate signup page works with clear login instructions, Guardian Portal has 'Affiliate' tab that displays affiliate dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page correctly displays 'PATENT-PENDING AI TECHNOLOGY' badge (not 'PATENTED')
Both en.json and es.json locale files have correct Patent-Pending translations
Affiliate Signup page shows clear instructions after signup success
Success page mentions 'Parent / Guardian Portal' and 'Affiliate' tab
'Login to Parent Portal' button exists on success page
Guardian Portal has 'Affiliate' tab visible in tab bar (data-testid='tab-affiliate')
AffiliateTab component correctly shows affiliate dashboard when user is an affiliate
GET /api/affiliates/my-stats endpoint works and returns affiliate data for logged-in users
seed_data_creation: Test affiliate accounts created during testing
